name: 키보드 사용 보장
issue: All 6 interactive elements (3 nav links, 2 main CTA links, 1 button) are reachable via Tab key. Focus moves sequentially through each element.

name: 초점 표시
issue: Focused element (A tag) shows outline: 'rgb(16, 16, 16) auto 1px'. Default browser focus indicator is visible on all interactive elements.

name: 콘텐츠 명도 대비
issue: All text elements pass WCAG AA contrast requirements. Measured pairs: text-zinc-900 on white (~17:1), text-zinc-600 on white (~9:1), text-zinc-700 on white (~11:1), white on bg-blue-600 (~5.9:1), text-blue-600 on white (~5.9:1). All exceed 4.5:1 for normal text (14px) and 3:1 for large text (36px heading).

name: 중복 ID 금지
issue: DOM contains 1 element with an id attribute. No duplicate IDs found.

name: ARIA 상태 변경
issue: Hamburger menu button ('메뉴 열기') toggles mobile navigation visibility on click, but does not have aria-expanded attribute to communicate open/closed state to assistive technology. The button label also does not change to '메뉴 닫기' when expanded.
fix_guide: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} to the hamburger menu button element and toggle the accessible label between '메뉴 열기' and '메뉴 닫기' based on menu state.

name: 초점 이동 순서
issue: Homepage does not contain modal or popup triggers. Hamburger menu uses a disclosure pattern where focus remaining on the trigger button is acceptable behavior.

name: 요청에 의한 변경
issue: No <select> elements present on the homepage.

name: 오류 정정 방법 제공
issue: No form elements present on the homepage.

name: 일관된 내비게이션
issue: Navigation structure (TestApp logo link + navigation links) persists consistently when navigating between homepage and other pages (할 일 page verified). Same nav bar structure with identical link order.
